prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, a widely used method for stock price forecasting. This model assumes that daily logarithmic returns are normally distributed. Using historical data for MA (Mastercard Inc.) over approximately the past year, the daily drift (average logarithmic return) was estimated to be around 0.0007, and the daily volatility (standard deviation of logarithmic returns) was estimated to be about 0.015. With the current price of $517.21, these parameters were used to project the price 6 days into the future. The point estimate represents the median of the projected log-normal price distribution, while the confidence intervals are derived from the corresponding percentiles (25th/75th for 50%, 10th/90th for 80%, and 5th/95th for 90%) of this predicted distribution.
